question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list any main sections or chapters of the thesis. It only provides an introductory paragraph with problem statement and context. Without a chapter list, the reader cannot identify the structure of the work.

question: Description
feedback: The introduction does not briefly describe the contents of each section. It merely outlines the problem, motivation, and constraints of the proposed solution. A section-by-section summary is missing.

question: Structure
feedback: Because the text lacks a chapter list and section descriptions, it is not possible to infer the general structure of the thesis from this excerpt alone. The reader has no clear idea of how the work is organized.
